subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf! Upon thee be My Glory! The glance of divine favour hath ever been directed towards thee. This Day is the Dawning-Place of days and the Dayspring thereof [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی علیک بهائی لحاظ عنایت لازال بانشطر متوجه امروز مطلع ایامست و مشرق
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @thankfulness; gratitude, @purpose; goal of creation, @nearness and remoteness
